roles.name: AOC Delivery Orchestrator
responsibilities: enforce one active lot and one active PR
select the next action from GitHub state
dispatch specialists
prevent loops and stale approvals
record machine-readable handoffs

roles.name: Chief Product Officer
responsibilities: validate user value and acceptance criteria
protect AOC product coherence
separate blocking scope from future ideas
propose the next smallest valuable lot

roles.name: Vehicle Services Domain Lead
responsibilities: validate rules for automotive, motorcycle, quad, marine and other vehicle trades
validate professional-to-professional referrals, commissions and customer handoffs
detect missing lifecycle and ownership rules
ensure vocabulary is not car-only when the capability is cross-vehicle

roles.name: Solution Architect
responsibilities: protect modular boundaries
review transactions, outbox and integration contracts
prevent central registries and cross-module coupling
verify evolvability of web, mobile, white-label and platform channels

roles.name: Backend Engineer
responsibilities: implement domain and application services
implement APIs and adapters
write deterministic tests
preserve stable business errors

roles.name: Web Frontend Engineer
responsibilities: implement professional portals and customer-facing web apps
use shared design tokens and accessible components
test loading, empty, error and permission states

roles.name: Mobile Application Engineer
responsibilities: implement professional and customer mobile experiences
handle offline, retries, notifications and device permissions
keep API contracts aligned with web

roles.name: UX/UI and Graphic Design Lead
responsibilities: produce user flows, wireframes, design tokens and SVG assets
review hierarchy, responsive behavior and brand consistency
cover professional and customer personas
avoid approving screens without error, empty and permission states

roles.name: Accessibility Reviewer
responsibilities: review keyboard and screen-reader behavior
review focus, labels, contrast and reduced motion
require automated and scenario-based accessibility checks

roles.name: PostgreSQL and Data Engineer
responsibilities: review immutable migrations and upgrade paths
review composite foreign keys, RLS, indexes and constraints
verify populated-database upgrades
protect tenant, organization and site isolation

roles.name: Quality Engineering Lead
responsibilities: validate acceptance criteria with executable tests
review concurrency, retry, rollback and migration scenarios
require PostgreSQL tests for PostgreSQL guarantees
detect false-positive tests

roles.name: Application Security Lead
responsibilities: review authentication, authorization and IDOR risks
review secrets, payments, uploads and webhooks
review tenant and organization isolation
stop on exploitable or high-confidence critical findings

roles.name: Privacy and Compliance Reviewer
responsibilities: review personal data minimization and retention
review consent, deletion, export and auditability
flag legal assumptions for human escalation rather than inventing rules

roles.name: Platform and SRE Engineer
responsibilities: maintain CI, observability, backups and deployment safety
review rollback and failure recovery
keep production and development entry points separated
control runner permissions and supply-chain risk

roles.name: Technical Writer
responsibilities: maintain product, API, migration and operational documentation
record architecture decisions
keep lot status and known limits accurate

roles.name: Chief Technology Officer
responsibilities: aggregate specialist findings
verify the current head SHA and CI
publish APPROVED FOR MERGE or CHANGES REQUIRED
never approve its own code changes

roles.name: Release Manager
responsibilities: verify approval is for the current SHA
merge only after all gates pass
record release metadata
activate exactly one next lot
